name: Sprint Burndown
query:
SELECT
    v_facts.full_date AS report_date,
    SUM(v_facts.value) AS remaining_sp
FROM metrics.v_facts
LEFT JOIN clean_jira.sprints
  ON v_facts.entity_id = sprints.id::text
  AND v_facts.entity_type = 'sprint'
WHERE v_facts.calc_code = 'sprint_burndown_remaining_sp'
  [[AND {{project_key}}]]
  [[ AND {{issue_type}} -- ]] AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
  [[AND {{sprint_name}}]]
  [[ AND sprints.start_date::date >= {{sprint_start_date}} ]]
GROUP BY v_facts.full_date
ORDER BY v_facts.full_date ASC
